reason: Enabling/disabling a routing rule is a functional addition to the rules engine (an Enabled flag on SortRule, skipped in SortService.MatchedRuleIndex), not a redesign. The UI diff only adds an 'Enabled' checkbox to the rule detail header, a '(off)' prefix and dimmed opacity to the disabled rule's existing list row, reusing the established layout, palette and controls. Wheel geometry, colours, animations and the editor layout are untouched. The rest of the diff is SortService and tests. No new screen or visual language was introduced, so there is nothing for a mockup set to compare against.
